name_cn:
🎉Embroidered Quilted Hobo🎉1BC204 Handbag/Clutch/Crossbody Bag
This Hobo handbag/clutch/crossbody bag is extremely functional, multi-use in one bag, perfect 🎉🎉. Made of imported nylon fabric/imported cross-grain cowhide, complex hand-stitched quilted pattern, equipped with a removable iron buckle, adjustable leather shoulder strap for easy switching 😘😘. Looks beautiful on, convenient and practical 🎉🎉. Grab yours now 👏👏
23L x 16H x 6.5W cm
